title: Matching Rudraksha Beads, Band Aid On Fingers: Rupali Chakankar, Sunil Tatkare Face 'Black Magic' Heat Amid Godman Ashok Kharat Row
description: Photos of Rupali Chakankar and Sunil Tatkare have gone viral on social media platforms where a band aid was spotted on their fingers on various occasions, which suggests, according to some believers, that the two were involved in black magic.
